title: George's flying island
description: Adds a small flying island with George the villager inside his small house
body:
This mod adds a floating island to your world, on this island, you'll find a small house where George, the villager, resides.

George is a skytrader with unique trades.

Additionally, you can explore a hidden cave that is revealed only when you find the secret lever, inside the cave, you can discover some valuable loot.
